settings.heading: Made-to-order products need clear expectations.
settings.text: Use this page to explain production time, shipping, tracking, damaged items, and custom-product return rules before customers buy.

settings.question: Production time
settings.answer: Most products are printed after checkout. Add your final production window after testing your chosen supplier.

settings.question: Shipping and tracking
settings.answer: Once the product ships, tracking details should be sent to the customer through Shopify email notifications.

settings.question: Custom product returns
settings.answer: Custom printed products are usually final sale unless damaged, defective, or incorrectly printed. Replace with your final legal policy.

settings.question: Damaged or wrong item
settings.answer: Ask customers to contact support with photos, packaging images, and order number within your chosen support window.

settings.heading: Finalize this after supplier testing.
settings.text: These are strong starter policies, but confirm exact timelines, replacement rules, and legal wording before launch.
